descriptions.text: Pokemon Cerulean Aquarium is a GBA ROM Hack by yoshord based on Pokemon Emerald in English. It was created for the Team Aqua ROM Hacking Competition and is now available to download. It was released on September 9, 2024.

An evil team has invaded an Aquarium. They haven’t been too disruptive, aside from taking the director for “a little chat”, so the aquarium is still operating, but still. Go into the aquarium and kick out the evil team.
